unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: met up with friends
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: meet（遇见）+ up（向上/到一起）= 碰头

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I visited the science museum.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: mu（母）+ se（色）+ um（嗯）：母亲在色彩丰富的博物馆里嗯了一声。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Yes, there was a space exhibition.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: ex（外）+ hi（嗨）+ bit（一点）+ ion（名词后缀）：在外面对着展览大声说嗨，一点点看。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I didn't mean to, but I gave them the wrong directions.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: di（第）+ rec（记录）+ tion（后缀）：第一条记录方向的信息。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: How was your school trip to the wastewater plant?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: t（特）+ rip（撕开）：特别想撕开地图去旅行。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: How was your school trip to the wastewater plant?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: waste（浪费/废物）+ water（水）= 废水

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: How was your school trip to the wastewater plant?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: p（铺）+ lant（蓝天）：工厂铺满了蓝天下的土地。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Well, first, dirty water from our homes goes into the plant.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: in（在内）+ to（向）= 进入……内部

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Then, special screens remove large pieces of waste from the water.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: re（重新）+ move（移动）：重新移动就是把它移开。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Then, special screens remove large pieces of waste from the water.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: pi（屁）+ ece（鹅）：一只屁股大的鹅被分成了好几块。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Then, special screens remove large pieces of waste from the water.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: w（我）+ aste（阿司特）：我把阿司特扔了，它是废弃物。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Well, large machines remove germs and other things from the water.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: ma（马）+ chine（吃的）：马在吃机器生产的饲料。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Well, large machines remove germs and other things from the water.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: ge（哥）+ rm（人民）：哥哥告诉人民要远离细菌。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It takes a few more steps after that before the water becomes clean again.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: s（死）+ tep（铁盆）：一步步跨过死人的铁盆。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I used to think it was easy to get clean water.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: used（使用过/旧的）+ to（去）：过去经常去做，现在已经成了旧习惯。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I didn't realize it was so hard.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: real（真实的）+ ize（使……化）：使事情变得真实，就是意识到或实现它。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: You could go inside them and see how astronauts live and work!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: in（在里）+ side（边）= 在里边

unit_vocabulary.comparison: go on a trip vs go for a trip
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I can't go on the school trip tomorrow.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: go（去）+ on a trip（在旅途中）= 去旅行

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Do you keep a diary?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: di（弟）+ ary（阿里）：弟弟在阿里山写日记。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Do you agree with Sam that food tastes better when you work for them?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: a（一个）+ gree（绿色）：大家都同意在那棵绿树下集合。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Do you agree with Sam that food tastes better when you work for them?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: agree（同意）+ with（与……一起）= 与某人意见一致

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Fu Xing learnt about the cleaning process.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: pro（向前）+ cess（走）：向前走的路程就是过程。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We went to the theatre to watch a show.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: the（那个）+ atre（阿特雷）：阿特雷在那个剧场演戏。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We took a school trip to a factory.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: fac（脸）+ tory（托里）：托里的脸在工厂里被熏黑了。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It was terrible!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: terri（特里）+ ble（比乐）：特里吃比乐（槟榔）的感觉很糟糕。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: My favourite actor, the day before yesterday, I saw in a film.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: act（表演）+ or（人）= 演员

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We saw many things such as old photos, paintings, and guns.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: g（公）+ un（安）：公安拿着枪。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We also tried on some uniforms from the past.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: try（尝试）+ on（在身上）= 试穿

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We walked along the mountain roads and thought about the past.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: a（一）+ long（长）：沿着一条长长的路走。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We walked along the mountain roads and thought about the past.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: ro（肉）+ ad（广告）：路上到处都是卖肉的广告。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Many people back then worked hard to create what we have today.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: cre（渴）+ ate（吃）：渴了想吃东西，于是创造了饮料。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Record thoughts and feelings.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: re（反复）+ cord（心）：反复记在心上，就是记录。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Improve writing skills.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: s（死）+ kill（杀）：杀人的技能练到死。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Write down new ideas.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: write（写）+ down（向下/在本子上）= 写下来

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: In the morning, we explored the farm.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: ex（外）+ plore（普洛）：到外面普洛（到处走）去探索。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: There were large tents with tomatoes, cucumbers, and many other fruits and vegetables.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: ten（十）+ t（头）：十个头挤在帐篷里。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: There were large tents with tomatoes, cucumbers, and many other fruits and vegetables.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: cu（酷）+ cum（看）+ ber（吧）：这根黄瓜酷吧，快来看。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The farmer told us about how these fruits and vegetables go from the fields to our tables.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: from（从）+ to（到）= 表示起止点

unit_vocabulary.meaning: 直接; 立即; 笔直地
unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Then we got straight to work!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: st（死特）+ raight（来得）：死特来得很快，笔直地冲过来。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Slowly, we filled many baskets.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: f（饭）+ ill（病）：饭装满了碗，吃到病了。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Slowly, we filled many baskets.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: bas（巴士）+ ket（客特）：巴士载满了客特（筐子）。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: In the afternoon, the farmer taught us how to cut branches and leaves from tomato plants.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: tea（茶）+ ch（吃）：一边喝茶一边吃，老师在教书。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: In the afternoon, the farmer taught us how to cut branches and leaves from tomato plants.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: br（播）+ anch（安其）：播种在树枝上安其（安装）果实。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: In the afternoon, the farmer taught us how to cut branches and leaves from tomato plants.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: lea（累）+ f（飞）：叶子飞得很累。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Finally, we watered the plants.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: final（最终的）+ ly（副词后缀）= 终于

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It made me think of the saying, "Every grain comes from hard work."
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: think（思考）+ of（关于）= 想起某事

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Every grain comes from hard work.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: g（个）+ rain（雨）：每一个雨点落下的地方都长出了谷物。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: My mum cooked some for dinner, and they were fresh and delicious!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: f（发）+ resh（热射）：新鲜的蔬菜在发热射光芒。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: They certainly taste better when you work for them!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: certain（肯定的）+ ly（副词后缀）= 肯定地

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Read Sam's diary entry.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: en（在里）+ try（尝试）：在入口处尝试进入。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: lost a book
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: lost（丢失）+ a book（一本书）

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: took the wrong bus
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: took（乘坐）+ wrong（错误的）+ bus（公交车）

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: gave directions
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: give（给）+ directions（方向）= 指路

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: they looked like parts of a space station.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: space（太空）+ station（站）= 太空站

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I got on the wrong bus.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: get（得到）+ on（在上面）= 登上（交通工具）

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Many people back then worked hard to create what we have today.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: back（回过头）+ then（那时）= 回到那时

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Then we got straight to work!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: get（变得）+ straight（笔直地/直接地）+ to work（进入工作）

unit_vocabulary.meaning: 用手工作; 体力劳动
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It was tiring, but I enjoyed working with my hands.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: work（工作）+ with（用）+ hands（双手）

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Today was an amazing day. There was a total solar eclipse in Wuhan!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: solar（太阳的）+ eclipse（消逝/日食）= 太阳消逝（日食）

unit_vocabulary.meaning: 前程远大; 无限可能
unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: Multi-syllable: the sky is the limit
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The sky is the limit!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: sky（天空）+ is the limit（是极限）：天空才是极限，说明潜力无限。
